title: Spleef Toys
description: Build spleef arenas in survival with the level of convenience offered by server plugins
body:
# Spleef Toys

[![](https://i.imgur.com/UoIBayo.png)](https://modfest.net/1.21)

Build spleef arenas in survival with the level of convenience offered by server plugins.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GTNhQH0z/images/366c0a61f4f22a381c40f47b72827be33ecc1bf6.png)

## Crafting & Usage

Most items in this mod are crafted with quartz, an item useful for providing smarts to blocks like the observer and the comparator.

### Spleef Shovel

This is your tool for playing spleef in this mod! It can instantly mine pixel blocks, but only during a game of spleef. It will also work in adventure mode.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GTNhQH0z/images/2182bc19ae870b2f2169f6e6ec91212593bccb36.png)

### Spleef Controller

This block lets you create games of spleef and play against others. You interact with it to join or leave the game of spleef. Unlimited players can join.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GTNhQH0z/images/3d698e0c1f7cbde1574d8c855f32c8e628d8dd9b.png)

### Pixel

This is the block you use to build your spleef arena floors out of. After a game of spleef ends these will reset to their original state. They come in all 16 colors!

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GTNhQH0z/images/d66415a250176395e85b7711e9693f68eac8b8fb.png)

### Spawn Point

Once you join a game of spleef, all players need to stand on this block for the countdown to begin until the game starts.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GTNhQH0z/images/d33a1fdae34d7b6c5780622a6c57d30c0619b0ec.png)
